title: Paving screed with a locking device and road paver with such a paving device
abstract: The invention relates to a paving screed (7) for a road paver (1), comprising an upper frame (14), a lower frame (15) mounted on the upper frame (14) in a height-adjustable manner, a linear actuator configured to adjust the lower frame (15) vis-a-vis the upper frame (14) in a vertical direction, a height-adjustment drive (16) configured to drive the linear actuator, and a locking device (23) configured to immobilize the lower frame (15) in its position relative to the upper frame (14), wherein the locking device (23) is connected to the upper frame (14) and the lower frame (15) and comprises an essentially vertically oriented hydraulic cylinder (20) configured to exert a clamping force at least partially parallel to the direction of adjustment of the linear actuator on the latter so that a frictional connection is created in the linear actuator, which prevents an adjustment of the linear actuator. Moreover, the invention relates to a road paver with such a paving screed.
claims: Claims 1. Paving screed (7) for a road paver (1 ), comprising - an upper frame (14), - a lower frame (15) mounted on the upper frame (14) in a height-adjustable manner, - a linear actuator configured to adjust the lower frame (15) vis-a-vis the upper frame (14) vertically, - a height-adjustment drive (16) configured to drive the linear actuator, and - a locking device (23) configured to immobilize the lower frame (15) in its position relative to the upper frame (14), characterized in that the locking device (23) is connected to the upper frame (14) and to the lower frame (15) and comprises an essentially vertically oriented hydraulic cylinder (20) configured to exert a clamping force on the linear actuator in a direction at least partially parallel to the direction of adjust ment of the linear actuator so that a frictional connection is created in the linear actuator, which blocks the linear actuator. 2. Paving screed (7) according to claim 1 , characterized in that the linear actuator is a spindle drive (19), comprising a threaded spindle (30) and a female thread (31), wherein the hydraulic cylinder (20) is configured to exert a clamping force on the spindle drive (19) in a direction at least partially parallel to the direction of adjustment of the spindle drive (19) so that a frictional connection is created between the threaded spindle (30) and the female thread (31), which blocks the spindle drive (19). 3. Paving screed (7) according to one of the previous claims, characterized in that the hydraulic cylinder (20) is single-acting. 4. Paving screed (7) according to one of the previous claims, characterized in that the hydraulic cylinder (20) comprises a spring (25) that preloads the hydraulic cylinder (20) in such a way that the spring preloading creates the clamping force parallel to the direction of adjustment of the linear actuator. 5. Paving screed (7) according to one of the preceding claims, characterized in that the hydraulic cylinder (20) is attached to the upper frame (14) and/or the lower frame (15) by means of a joint, in particular a pivot bearing (34). 6. Paving screed (7) according to one of the preceding claims, characterized in that a guide (26) is provided that guides a movement caused by the hydraulic cylinder (20) in a direction essentially parallel to the direction of adjustment of the linear actuator. 7. Paving screed (7) according to claim 6, characterized in that the guide (26) comprises an outer sleeve (22), an inner sleeve (29) mounted in the outer sleeve (22) in a sliding manner and a screw (21) mounted in the sleeves (22, 29) and connected to the hydraulic cylinder (20) and the lower frame (15). 8. Paving screed (7) according to claim 6, characterized in that the guide (26) comprises an outer sleeve (22) and in that the hydraulic cylinder (20) is mounted at least partially in the outer sleeve (22). 9. Paving screed (7) according to claim 8, characterized in that the hydraulic cylinder (20) comprises a sliding bearing (28) and is mounted with the sliding bearing (28) in a sliding manner in the outer sleeve (22). 10. Paving screed (7) according to one of the previous claims, characterized i n that the hydraulic cylinder (20) is arranged outside the area between the upper frame (14) and the lower frame (15). 11. Paving screed (7) according to one of claims 1 to 8, characterized i n that the hydraulic cylinder (20) is arranged essentially completely in the area between the upper frame (14) and the lower frame (15). 12. Paving screed (7) according to one of the previous claims, characterized in that the hydraulic cylinder (20) is arranged between two linear actuators, for example spindle drives (19), arranged one behind the other in the working direction (a) of the paving screed (7). 13. Paving screed (7) according to one of the preceding claims, characterized in that the paving screed (7) comprises a basic screed (9) and at least one add-on and/or extendable screed (10) and in that each extendable screed (10) comprises a locking device (23). 14. Road paver (1) with a paving screed (7) in accordance with one of the preceding claims.
